description_long: This motorcycle features a classic design with a red fuel tank, black seat, and chrome accents throughout its frame and engine. The bike is equipped with two large spoked wheels, a round headlamp at the front, and a pair of rearview mirrors mounted on wide handlebars. The exhaust pipes are visible along the right side, and the rear section includes a taillight and a license plate holder. The seat is long and flat, suitable for carrying a passenger, and the overall build suggests a vintage or retro style. The frame and engine components are predominantly metallic, with rubber tires and some plastic elements on the lights and controls.
description: A vintage-style motorcycle with a red fuel tank, chrome details, and black seat, featuring spoked wheels and classic round headlamp.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the taillight, license plate, rear wheel, and the full length of the seat.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the red fuel tank, engine, spoked wheels, and the full profile of the seat and exhaust.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the round headlamp, handlebars with mirrors, and the front wheel alignment.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the exhaust pipes, engine, and the overall silhouette of the motorcycle.
